info.title: Real Estate API
info.description:
## Real Estate Backend API

This API powers the real estate platform, supporting property listings, user management, and bookings.

### Authentication & RBAC
All protected endpoints require a `role` header indicating the caller's role.
Valid roles: `superuser`, `admin`, `agent`, `seller`, `buyer`

### Response Format
All responses follow the envelope: `{ success, statusCode, message, data }`

### Error Format
All errors follow: `{ success: false, statusCode, message, errors? }`

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User registration, profiles, and role management

tags.name: Properties
tags.description: Property CRUD — managed by agents and admins

role-header.name: role
role-header.description: User role for RBAC (superuser | admin | agent | seller | buyer)

email.description: Valid email address — used as login identifier

password.description: Password: 8–32 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character

description.example: Beautifully furnished 3BHK with sea view, modular kitchen, and 24/7 security.

listingType.description: Listing type — for sale or rent

price.description: Price in INR (₹). Must be a positive number.

images.description: List of property images as external URLs or uploaded image data strings

agentId.description: ID of the agent managing this property

notes.example: Please ensure the property agent is present.

propertyId.description: ID of the property to book a viewing for

buyerId.description: ID of the buyer making the booking

notes.description: Optional notes or special requests for the viewing
notes.example: Please ensure the property agent is present.
Buyer will bring their architect for inspection.
